title: DeprecatedBridge
content:
# DeprecatedBridge

Inherits from: ApiServiceModel


## Methods


### deploy_bridge(data: Optional[Union[requests.BridgeDeploy, Mapping[str, object]]], _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.BridgeDeploy

Deploy a Bridge (Connection) from the App Registry as a Workload to a Cluster/Node.


### list_bridges(names: Optional[Sequence[str]], search: Optional[Sequence[str]], cluster_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], workload_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], status_state: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_name: Optional[Sequence[str]], app_version: Optional[Sequence[str]], pagination_type: Optional[Literal[limits, cursor, stream]], page_size: Optional[int], page: Optional[int], next: Optional[str], previous: Optional[str], direction: Optional[Literal[asc, desc]], sort_by: Optional[Sequence[str]], fetch: bool, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> Union[KList[responses.BridgeItem], responses.BridgesListPaginatedResponseCursor]

Returns a list of Bridges (also known as Connections) and its parameters. The list can be optionally filtered and sorted on the server before being returned.


### delete_bridge(bridge_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Permanently delete an existing Bridge (Connection). You will no longer receive Asset / Data Stream data from the assets associated with the Bridge (Connection). This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.


### get_bridge(bridge_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> responses.BridgeGet

Retrieve the parameters of a Bridge (Connection).


### start_bridge(bridge_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Start running the Bridge (Connection).


### stop_bridge(bridge_name: str, _dry_run: bool, _client: Optional[SyncBaseClient]) -> None

Stop running the Bridge (Connection). **Permission Required:** `kelvin.permission.bridge.update`.

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client()
result = client.client.api.deprecated_bridge.deploy_bridge()
